tools.name: prefab_diff
tools.description: Semantic diff for Unity YAML assets (.prefab/.unity/.asset) between two git versions. Use this instead of reading raw YAML diffs: it matches objects by fileID and reports added/removed/modified GameObjects, components, fields, and prefab overrides with resolved names.

after.description: Target git ref; omit to compare against the working tree

projectRoot.description: Repository root; defaults to the server cwd
